name: seo-article-audit
description: Diagnose why an AIHR article declined in organic traffic and decide whether there is a viable SEO salvage strategy. Reads the article, checks prior Outline analysis, derives primary and secondary keyword candidates, pulls GSC and Ahrefs facts, delegates factual SERP observation, and reports a human-in-the-loop strategy recommendation before any optimization work. Also bundles serp-analysis for factual US Google SERP screenshot and feature inventory, article-diff-md for red/green diff-block Markdown files, and outline-article-refresh-memory so assistants proactively keep monthly Outline records and attachments up to date during SEO refresh work.

interface.longDescription: Reads an AIHR article, checks prior Outline analysis, pulls Google Search Console and Ahrefs facts, delegates factual SERP observation for primary and secondary keywords, and reports a human-in-the-loop salvage strategy before optimization work begins.
defaultPrompt: Why did this AIHR article decline?
Run SEO analysis for this URL
Save this SEO refresh in Outline
